traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.description: Advantage on saving throws against poison, resistance against poison damage.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.description: Double proficiency bonus on History checks related to stonework.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.description: HP maximum increases by 1, and again by 1 every time you gain a level.

traits.name: Dwarven Armor Training
traits.description: You have proficiency with light and medium armor.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: Advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: Elves don't need to sleep. Instead, they meditate deeply for 4 hours a day.

traits.name: Cantrip
traits.description: You know one cantrip of your choice from the wizard spell list.

traits.name: Fleet of Foot
traits.description: Base walking speed increases to 35 feet.

traits.name: Mask of the Wild
traits.description: Can attempt to hide when lightly obscured by foliage, rain, snow, mist, or other natural phenomena.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.description: Disadvantage on attack rolls and Perception checks in direct sunlight.

traits.name: Drow Magic
traits.description: You know the dancing lights cantrip.

traits.name: Lucky
traits.description: When you roll a 1 on a d20, you can reroll and must use the new roll.

traits.name: Brave
traits.description: Advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.description: Can move through the space of any creature that is of a size larger than yours.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.description: Can attempt to hide when obscured by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.

traits.name: Stout Resilience
traits.description: Advantage on saving throws against poison, resistance against poison damage.
